case_title: GUAAN ZHAO VS. JESSICA CHURCHES ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO JESSICA CHURCHES BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-21-2015 AT 6:30 PM.
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES. (ADDITIONAL COPY TO CALIFORNIA MASSAGE THERAPY COUNCIL)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED JUL-14-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KING, RYAN (CALIFORNIA MASSAGE THERAPY COUNCIL LIASON)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JESSICA CHURCHES IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS GRANTED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---FRANCIS HA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY ZHAO, GUAAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHURCHES, JESSICA (ART HEALING INSTITUTE) KING, RYAN (CALIFORNIA MASSAGE THERAPY COUNCIL LIASON) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2015 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, RYAN (CALIFORNIA MASSAGE THERAPY COUNCIL LIASON)
RESPONSE TO VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHAO, GUAAN
